Big Bash League Introduces Designated Player Rule for 2026-27 Season

Jan 18, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Big Bash League Introduces Designated Player Rule for 2026-27 Season

The Big Bash League (BBL) is set to innovate again by introducing the Designated Player Rule for the 2026-27 season.

Following the success of the Power Surge and the X-Factor Rule, this new regulation aims to give teams greater tactical flexibility while enhancing the pace and excitement of matches.

Fans and analysts are already speculating how franchises will utilize the rule to maximize strategic advantage, potentially changing the dynamics of the league.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Big Bash League Introduces Designated Player Rule for 2026-27 Season
